creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214105
Patch for LAME

Backport following commits from upstream:

r6438 - bug tracker item #496: A critical bug in init_xrpow_core_sse
https://sourceforge.net/p/lame/svn/6438/

r6444 - bug fix for tracker item #500 Buffer overflow in encoder
https://sourceforge.net/p/lame/svn/6444/

r6445 - bug fix for tracker item 501 Encoder: Assertion `eov->bitrate_index <= cfg->vbr_max_bitrate_index' failed
https://sourceforge.net/p/lame/svn/6445/

Add option to use tmkk's SSE2/SSE3/SSE4.1 optimization patch
Ref: https://tmkk.undo.jp/lame/index_e.html
Source: https://www.freac.org/downloads-mainmenu-33/214-codec-sources-and-patches

Add option to use slicing-by-8 CRC calculations
Ref: https://hydrogenaud.io/index.php?topic=115900.0
Source: https://www.freac.org/downloads-mainmenu-33/214-codec-sources-and-patches

Tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r360454 (AMD64)
Poudriere testport OK 12.1-RELEASE (AMD64)
